W H A T D O  W E D O ?

celebrate and elevate

communication with

to bring awareness to

community and plan

wrapping for students
across the district

for Adults about
Important Topics

VOLUNTEERS!

bit.ly/trunkhost25VOLUNTEER:

TREAT
DONATIONSTREAT
DONATIONS
- REGULAR CANDY
- ALLERGY-FRIENDLY CANDY LIKE
STARBURSTS, SMARTIES, DUM DUMS,
SWEDISH FISH, ETC
- NON-CANDY TREATS LIKE GLOWSTICKS,
PLAYDOH, PENCILS, ETC WE ’RE LOOKING FOR CANDY AND NON-
CANDY TREAT DONATIONS TO MAKE
TRUNK OR TREAT A FA-BOO-LOUS EVENT
FOR ALL! PLEASE CONSIDER DONATING THE
FOLLOWING:ST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA
Send your donations to school with your child

Join us for our n e x t PTA 
General Meeting ! 
Wednesday, October 8th
8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom
Link to follow via PTA member emails and
Wednesday Folder
We look forward to seeing you there!
